commit.subject: LU-19186 tests: debug setfacl failure
commit.message:
LU-19186 tests: debug setfacl failure

This patch adds RHEL 9.6 server support to debug the setfacl
"Operation not supported" failure.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testlist=sanity

Change-Id: I7893a860ed0e3fbfdcb4e0fc54bb8ac0678d2ecd
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
